example:

meaning: no longer be as skilled as before
example:
I think I'm losing my touch.
He hasn't lost his touch.
She never loses her touch.

The band made a comeback.
Vinyl made a comeback.
She made a strong comeback.

I've been on edge all day.

We walk a fine line here.
